settings.heading: Privacy Policy
settings.intro: At ELARÉ, your trust is our foundation. We are deeply committed to protecting your privacy, and we treat your personal information with the respect it deserves — like a promise kept.

settings.title: 1. What We Collect
settings.body:
When you visit our store, place an order, or contact us, we may collect:

  • Name, contact number, and email address
  • Delivery address and billing details
  • Payment method (excluding sensitive card info, which is encrypted)
  • Information you voluntarily share (e.g., skin concerns or preferences)

We never collect more than we need, and we never sell or share your data for profit.

settings.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
settings.body:
We use your information to:

  • Process and deliver your orders
  • Send you confirmations and delivery updates
  • Offer customer support
  • Provide personalized recommendations
  • Share special offers (only if you've opted in)

Our intent is simple: serve you better, never intrude.

settings.title: 3. Your Consent
settings.body:
By using our site and placing an order, you consent to our collecting and using your information for the specific purpose of fulfilling your order and support services.

You can withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us at iibdaeielaris7@gmail.com.

settings.title: 4. Keeping Your Data Safe
settings.body: We take data security seriously. Your information is stored in secure environments and protected through encrypted technology and trusted platforms. Only authorized personnel can access it when needed to assist you.

settings.title: 5. Sharing Your Data
settings.body:
We do not sell your personal data. We only share it:

  • With trusted delivery partners to fulfill your order
  • When required by law or for fraud prevention

Even then, only the bare minimum is shared — never more than necessary.

settings.title: 6. Cookies & Tracking
settings.body: We use cookies to enhance your shopping experience, understand what you love, and keep improving. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, but this might affect site functionality.

settings.title: 7. Your Rights
settings.body:
You have every right to:

  • Request what data we hold about you
  • Correct or update your information
  • Ask us to delete your data from our systems

We believe your data is your right, not our privilege.

settings.title: 8. Children's Privacy
settings.body: ELARÉ does not knowingly collect information from children under the age of 13. If we learn that we have done so unintentionally, we will delete it immediately.

settings.title: 9. Updates to This Policy
settings.body: This Privacy Policy may be updated occasionally. Changes will be posted here with a clear update date so you're always informed.

settings.title: Let's Stay Transparent
settings.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, or how we use your data, please reach out:
settings.footer_note: We're here to listen, serve, and build a community of trust — because ELARÉ isn't just skincare; it's care that stays.
